prompt: An anime light novel cover. Top left features a stylized Japanese title 黒焔の魔眼使いは、追放先の学園都市で三人の最強ヒロインに溺愛される and English subtitle The Exiled Black-Flame Eye in Arcane Metropolis. A vertical Japanese blurb on the right reads 追放されたはずの俺が、なぜか最強美少女たちの運命そのものになっていた。. The scene includes 4 characters and 1 creature. Centered is a male protagonist with black hair, a glowing red eye, and a dark coat. He is surrounded by 3 heroines: a top-right girl with long silver hair and a white-blue crystal dress; a mid-left blonde girl with a side ponytail casting a pink magic circle; and a bottom-right girl with short magenta hair holding a grimoire. A black-and-white wolf familiar sits bottom-left. The background is a dark gothic academy at night, filled with floating pink petals, glowing magic particles, shattered glass, and a faint demonic figure top-right.
